title: Using Dropdown value to create new item

posts.author: wsalling (william salling)
posts.cookedHtml:
is it possible to create automation that when a dropdown value matches a certain value to have it then create an item in another board and link them? i have not been able to to see where i can set the value. i see where i can say if it changes but not to a specific value.
i tried to then create a status column, but ran out of room in options.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@wsalling,

One alternative would be to use Integromat with a webhook called when the column changes. Another would be to use the following automation in conjunction with an auxiliary status column and the other automation you already referred to:

posts.author: wsalling (william salling)
posts.cookedHtml:
JCorrell:

Integromat

Thank you for the help
